Hey guys and welcome back. We're just going to take a quick look at the time compressor in action. So this is an email that was sent out to prospects around a high ticket coaching program, subject line five days ago or urgent five days, five hours, one shot. And we open up right at the beginning highlighting that relationship exchange, you know, what they asked from us and what we delivered. So five days ago, you asked me to change your life to help you take your current skills and desire to serve and to put them through a powerful and repeatable process for generating game changing monthly revenue. So really the big promise. You asked me to show you that no matter how many times you've stumbled before that it was still possible and flat out probable when given the right tools and systems. Five days ago, you asked me to reawaken your optimism. So an emotional benefit there to give you a reason to step up while giving your inner skeptic every reason to step down. You asked me to rapidly transform your earning potential into your earned reality while making every family conversation from here on out an expression of proud self assured achievement instead of a crippling exercise and guilt, shame and inadequacy. So once again, the biggest emotional payoff and the biggest emotional tension. Five days ago, you asked me to make you the next and we had names of certain past clients here and in turn make you the next big success story that inspires a new wave of coaches, consultants and service professionals to step into true freedom. Five days ago, you asked me to stack the deck in your favor to give you everything you need to confidently take the next step while stripping away all the things that sidetrack you from the mission. Five days ago, you asked me to change your life permanently for the betterment of you, your family, your clients and all those you'll soon be able to impact in a deeper, more fulfilling way. And for all you've asked, I asked for but one thing in return. So here's your reasonable reciprocation. Take 30 risk free days to see if we've succeeded and the minimum viable commitment because five days ago you asked me to change your life and in five hours, we'll both know just how much you meant it. So that's it. That's how it looks in action. Here's the template. These are all in your workbook. But really make sure to answer these exploratory questions first before diving in cold into the template. That'll definitely help you out and get your brain moving in the right direction. So that's it. Thanks for watching. I will catch you in the next video.
